title: v0.8 History and request id foundation

transitions.note: History (list + detail) backend, API routes, UI and request-id logging implemented in the working tree. Offline checks pass (typecheck, lint, test, docs:check). build/smoke and live Supabase verification are owner-only (no .env.local in this environment) and remain pending before this and the v0.7 release gate can be closed.

notes: Read-only history over existing tasks/model_responses/votes tables — no migration required. Identity is scoped in every query (service role bypasses RLS). Version/phase promotion to v0.8 is deferred until the owner closes the v0.7 live gate. Follow-up: backfill x-request-id into compare/code-compare/vote/guest/models/profile routes; optional covering indexes tasks(user_id, created_at desc) and tasks(anonymous_session_id, created_at desc).
